# Acceptance Criteria

Use Given / When / Then. Cover happy, negative, and boundary paths for each
story. AC must be observable pass/fail.

## <Story id> — <title>

### Happy path
- **Given** <precondition>
  **When** <action>
  **Then** <observable outcome>

### Negative path
- **Given** <precondition>
  **When** <invalid action>
  **Then** <error/rejection behavior>

### Boundary
- **Given** <edge precondition: empty / max / zero>
  **When** <action>
  **Then** <defined behavior at the boundary>

### Permissions (if applicable)
- **Given** an unauthorized actor
  **When** they attempt <action>
  **Then** the system denies it and <records audit / shows error>

### Effective-date boundary (if a rule/config changes over time)
- **Given** a rate/fee change effective on <date>
  **When** an event is dated just before <date>
  **Then** the prior version applies
- **Given** the same change
  **When** an event is dated on/after <date>
  **Then** the new version applies

### Cohort / backfill (existing vs new entities)
- **Given** an existing (pre-change) entity
  **When** the rule changes
  **Then** it is <grandfathered / migrated> as specified
- **Given** a new entity created after the change
  **When** it is evaluated
  **Then** the new rule applies

### Scheduled job (if a batch/job story)
- **Given** the job has already run for <period>
  **When** it runs again for the same <period>
  **Then** it is idempotent (no duplicate effect) and resumes cleanly after failure
